current_record: 16-16 (overall) / 9-9 (Patriot League, T-5th) — final, season ended March 2026

head_coach.name: Duane Simpkins
head_coach.background: Named American's 18th head men's basketball coach on April 1, 2023. Previously an assistant at George Mason for 8 seasons (Atlantic 10), with prior stops at UNC Greensboro and Towson. McDonald's All-American at DeMatha Catholic (DC area), three-time All-ACC Honorable Mention at Maryland (8th all-time in assists with 483). Led the Eagles to the 2024-25 Patriot League title and the program's first NCAA Tournament since 2014.

postseason_2025_26.result: Did not qualify; lost to Boston University 73-75 in Patriot League Tournament Quarterfinal as the 5 seed

sources.notes: Season summary, final record, postseason exit
Athletic director JM Caparro, Bender Arena, Patriot League
